items.text: · Community Awareness Bulletin 01-2026: Scams Associated with Major Events. View the PDF at http:// bit.ly/PSP-CAB126. Community Awareness Bulletins examine emerging crime trends and safety issues.

· May 7 Trooper Abhaisingh of Troop F visited Wyoming Seminary and Preschool. He read them a book and made them all Junior Troopers with their very own big hats. The tour of the patrol car was a big hit!

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 6 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Juan Figueroa-Cruz was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 6 On April 26, the Paterno Family Beaver Stadium Run for Special Olympics Pennsylvania drew thousands of participants. Proceeds benefit athletes across PA. Troop G Community Services Officer Trooper Rhymestine helped carry the Flame of Hope and light the main cauldron.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 5 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Rylee Anderson was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 5 PSP offers free car seat checks across the Commonwealth. Our certified technicians inspect child passenger safety seats for suitability, check for recalls, and perform installations. Find an event near you, from May 11-31, at http:// bit.ly/PSPchildseat.
